title: Chickens Dont Click
description: Muting the annoying stepping/clicking sound of chickens
body:
## This pack mutes the chickens' stepping sounds which get especially annoying with many chickens in a tight area

## Comparison video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/a2qjgL0lrCw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


The pack is extremely lightweight and unintrusive, it only edits the sounds.json file to play the stepping sound at a volume of 0(.000....1), this avoids console warns and lets other packs/mods play the sound files as normal, it also means the stepping sounds will still count towards the sound limit.
